title: UPPSC LT Grade Computer Science Full Paper Quiz
description: The complete set of 120 Computer Science questions from the UPPSC LT Grade exam, covering Programming, Data Structures, OS, DBMS, and Hardware.
heading: Complete Part - II: Computer Science

options: Both (A) and (R) are true but (R) is not the correct explanation of (A)
Both (A) and (R) are true and (R) is the correct explanation of (A)
